title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・最後の大一番

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I beat Tama! I won!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I was determined not to lose, so I ran as
fast as I could.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I hope that made Tama happy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! I'm still here, ya know!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaarrrrrgh! How could I screw dis up?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If only I coulda pushed dat extra step! If only I ran
better! I coulda beaten you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I gotta say... ya did real good out there. Ya
sure deserved that win.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But if ya think this battle's over, ya got another
thing comin'! After this, we got the race to end all
races...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen! Right?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Creek!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ngaaah!
'Ey, Creek! Ya just stole my thunder!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I just got a little excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You two ran amazingly well. Good work, both of
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I hope ya don't think ya can butter us up like that
again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Tamtam. I won't be going quite so
easy on you when we're out there on the track.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This is my long-awaited opportunity to compete
against Oguri again. And this time, you'll be there
too...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I've been looking forward to racing you as well,
Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I won't let you win, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Keep dreamin', Creek! You'll see I'm the real deal
when you two're eatin' my dust!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on winning. I have to—I can't
disappoint all the people out there waiting to see
me at my best.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I won't let either of you beat me. I'll be the one
who takes the Arima Kinen.

This year's Arima Kinen will be an all-star race. It's
set to be the ultimate clash of champions.

Even so, I'm confident Oguri Cap has what it
takes to win. I just need to use the time we have
left to our advantage and support her to the best
of my ability.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Anyways, how'd ya even get in here, Creek?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? Through the entrance, obviously.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't think there's any other way in. Do you
know of any secret passages?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You guys know dat's not what I meant!
